channel.title: Kde on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Kde on Arrans github.io

item.title: kjules
item.description: A C++ application built with KDE Frameworks that provides a desktop interface for interacting with the Google Jules API

item.title: kgithub-notify
item.description: A sleek GitHub notification system tray application written natively in C++ using Qt6 and KDE Frameworks 6 (KF6). It quietly monitors your GitHub account, notifying you when there are new notifications, and provides a rich desktop interface to manage themGithub notifier for KDE

item.title: KMagMux
item.description: Torrent and Magent file and protocol handler for routing to programs / services

item.title: kde-keyboard-shortcuts
item.description: A quick and simple installer for my kde keyboard bindings in system, as a deb/rpm file
